title: Ramp Transaction
description: Schema describing a Ramp card or bill transaction record returned by the Ramp Developer API.

amount.description: Transaction amount in the original currency.

merchant_name.description: Merchant or vendor name as captured at point of sale.

merchant_category_code.description: Merchant category code returned by the card network.

user_transaction_time.description: Timestamp the transaction was initiated by the user.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user that initiated the transaction.
